name: Turning one's face towards the east or the west is mentioned here only by way of
introduction:
illustration. The actual purpose of the verse is to emphasize that the observance of certain
outward religious rites, the performance of certain formal religious acts out of conformism,
and the manifestation of certain familiar forms of piety do not constitute that essential
righteousness which alone carries weight with God and earns His recognition and approval.
